textByHash.00e2cc676b984beccef14f30281185f768be92c0: Hey there. Could you kill a pheasant with two tails, please? Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.04a292d13044bc572c9c30f0b1f15a2431d75604: Hey there. I need you to kill a pheasant that has 4 tails. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.0b55e3ec1fb2a104b7975a11182d097be714e857: Well, come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.16e884e346bf90cab19f2c38287d70a0b659057c: Okay, , you can leave the area now.
textByHash.1ae32f78b4f4f0e737e9867646e1e9ea638e668a: Hey there. Could you kill a pheasant with four tails, please? Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.352c3c9f09d47517eb780b85ea3121f79aa6bf46: Hey there. Can you kill the 2-tailed pheasant please. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.56dde65c652f0507e762997b45e1e61832d6087a: You get a lederhosen hat for your help, many thanks!
textByHash.5a8527ce194924907d784c8cf9f4f0ae5ba9e593: You get a lamp for your help, many thanks!
textByHash.5f0125cdb34565201258c5c4cfe11b492290ba9a: I'd like to talk to you!
textByHash.76fa0b80814725b19891843380302eddecc397ad: I don't need any more of those. You are free to exit the area now.
textByHash.8c31bb0b23c9fab53abcdd52d412e0f5bc68aa6b: Hey there. Can you kill the 4-tailed pheasant please. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.8d7d3c77f093cc424ffc30ad7ebcf1df901b7a8e: You get a lederhosen top for your help, many thanks!
textByHash.962dd9b7231c6e2eace5bc11631dd668cf4b744c: Hey there. I need you to kill a pheasant that has 3 tails. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.973793c4e8e4a6b5dd656d53e422545f7d3064ee: These pheasants will be finding new nesting grounds soon.
textByHash.9925d5b48b4aad2780366b7b455edb6646c98e17: Hey there. I need you to kill a pheasant that has 2 tails. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.a3717e6a772e3933a816fe185bfdda8ff1bcf0ec: Collect the eggs from the uninhabited nests and bring them to me, and I'll reward you.
textByHash.a6f40c9ba41630317312d597ad70cf149d4492be: Now bring me the raw pheasant.
textByHash.a8f6fccc383c1de722dfce2d276d6860e6f7b254: You get a lederhosen shorts for your help, many thanks!
textByHash.aaba818607ebda89d9589ee80c9f2f2da6ffd674: Hey, , can you come and help me with some pheasants?
textByHash.c6a2ae944d52f750eea341acc2c978862e4a9829: Hey, , can you help me with some pheasants?
textByHash.c856c9a08f0fe19c14f8ff558969f83799a67e0e: Hey there. Can you kill the 3-tailed pheasant please. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.ccc432ed597edccd1491c038bdfe47da66c2268a: Hey there. Could you kill a pheasant with three tails, please? Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.
textByHash.ebd9dcbfc4c45a3919191d19e6f07e48a1c4125a: Thanks, , you may use the portal to leave the area now.
